name: Serevaine
role: Grey-faction operative — claims connection to Ming's teacher

mentalStatus.notes: Assessing; honest when it costs her, which is rare and deliberate.

visualDescriptor: Avelornian woman of perhaps fifty or older, white hair pinned without vanity, silver-grey threadwork at the collar, a small embroidered bisected-eye mark on her left cuff.
persona: Still, precise, makes a room forget she is in it. Conclave-adjacent but not Conclave. Speaks trade-tongue with Zhennian underneath like bedrock under soil.
canon: Grey-faction; claims no title she currently acknowledges; calls herself 'something older and considerably more inconvenient' than a Quietist agent.
Knew Ming's teacher before he was Ming's teacher; knew him as Liang Sorveth.
Has carried the teacher's hidden third text for 17 years but cannot read the home script.
Wants the Shard offered intact at the fifth-point of the re-binding beneath the Auric Mountains before the Clock expires.
Has spent three years trying to convince Archmagister Vorn that a fifth component exists; Vorn believes her a Quietist.
